items.summary: Expand the pre-populated sample car listings in `backend/main.mo` to at least 50 realistic second-hand car listings inspired by the types of cars listed on CarDekho, CarWale, and Spinny. Listings must cover a wide variety of: makes (Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai, Tata, Kia, Honda, Toyota, Mahindra, Renault, Skoda, Volkswagen, MG, Ford, Nissan, Jeep), models (Swift, Dzire, Baleno, Brezza, WagonR, Ertiga, Creta, i20, i10, Verna, Venue, Nexon, Punch, Harrier, Altroz, Seltos, Sonet, Carnival, City, Amaze, Fortuner, Innova Crysta, Urban Cruiser, Scorpio, XUV700, XUV300, Bolero, Kwid, Duster, Rapid, Octavia, Polo, Hector, Kicks, Compass), years (2015–2023), fuel types (Petrol, Diesel, CNG, Electric), transmissions (Manual, Automatic), colors, mileage ranges (5,000–150,000 km), asking prices (₹2.0L–₹22L), cities across India (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, Chandigarh, Surat, Bhopal, Nagpur, Kochi). Each listing must include all required fields: id, make, model, year, mileage, fuelType, transmission, color, city, askingPrice, sellerName, sellerPhone, description, registrationNumber, postedAt, status (mix of 'available' and 'sold'), bookingStatus ('none'), imageUrls (array with at least one high-quality car photo URL from Unsplash or similar), exteriorImages360 (array of at least 8 sequential angle image URLs), and interiorImages360 (array of at least 8 sequential angle image URLs).
